subject: Improving docker restart handler
commit_message:
Improving docker restart handler

There is a bug in docker which leads to not properly
shutdown service preventing subsequent startup.
https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/30348
This commit is preventing this problem to appear.

Change-Id: I29505610bd9954af01d73264e5414fdb2b9ac99d
Issue-ID: OOM-1735
Signed-off-by: Michal Ptacek <m.ptacek@partner.samsung.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

'Handlers' dir in ansible is for handlers that are called elsewhere only, i don't think we should put regular tasks there.

Patch Set 3:

Seems the issue is well known and still unfixed in docker itself, ie:
https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/30348

What if we 'reload' docker in favour of 'restarting'? Or restart docker without cycling the containers using "live-restore" feature (https://docs.docker.com/config/containers/live-restore/)?

Patch Set 3:

> Seems the issue is well known and still unfixed in docker itself,
 > ie:
 > https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/30348
 > 
 > What if we 'reload' docker in favour of 'restarting'? Or restart
 > docker without cycling the containers using "live-restore" feature
 > (https://docs.docker.com/config/containers/live-restore/)?

Thanks. And I'm all for the avoiding restarts.

Patch Set 3:

> > Seems the issue is well known and still unfixed in docker itself,
 > > ie:
 > > https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/30348
 > >
 > > What if we 'reload' docker in favour of 'restarting'? Or restart
 > > docker without cycling the containers using "live-restore"
 > feature
 > > (https://docs.docker.com/config/containers/live-restore/)?
 > 
 > Thanks. And I'm all for the avoiding restarts.

reload is not enough, some chances like adjusting /etc/docker/daemon.json can't be applied live and require daemon restart
